MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-10-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT EBER FLAMENCO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH AN ALTERNATE INSTALLMENT PLAN. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: R. VELUZ/E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-10-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT EBER FLAMENCO'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND COSTS AND COURT REPORTER FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: R. VELUZ/E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF ANSWER BY DEFENDANT EBER FLAMENCO ON 7/11/11 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
RETURNED MAIL - MOVED: ORDER STRIKING FILING FOR FAILURE TO PAY COURT FEES MAILED TO ABERT FLAMENCO - ADDRESS MATCHES 1ST APPEARANCE (ANSWER) OF JUL-11-2011
